features: BUILT-IN DISPENSER: This clever dish brush holds washing up liquid in its handle, making it easy to clean without constant refilling. Just press and scrub! Perfect for tackling everyday dishes after dinner or lunchboxes after school.

EASY TO REFILL AND REUSE: Simply unscrew the top, fill with washing up liquid, and you're ready to go. When the sponge wears out, clip on a fresh one to keep the brush working like new. Ideal for everyday cleaning in busy kitchens.

POWERFUL ON TOUGH STAINS: The built-in scouring sponge works hard to shift grease and grime, even on burnt-on food. Whether tackling casserole dishes or roasting tins, this brush powers through stubborn mess with ease.
REPLACEMENT SPONGES AVAILABLE: Don’t toss the brush—just swap out the sponge. These refill sponges are easy to attach, reducing waste and saving money. A great addition to eco-conscious home.

ERGONOMIC AND EASY TO HOLD: The comfortable handle makes scrubbing pots and pans less tiring, especially after big meals. Whether washing up late at night or after a party, this cleaning brush feels light and easy in hand.

PERFECT FOR BUSY HOUSEHOLDS: From family dinners to flat-share cooking, this dish brush is a reliable tool for keeping the kitchen spotless. Keep it by the sink to make quick work of daily washing up and last-minute clean-ups.

TIME-SAVING KITCHEN TOOL: With washing up liquid delivered directly through the sponge, there’s no need to juggle bottles mid-clean. Ideal for fast clean-ups after family meals, morning breakfasts or holiday baking sessions.

GENTLE ON DISHES AND CUTLERY: Despite its strong scrubbing ability, this brush is safe for use on plates, cutlery, glasses and more. It's tough where it counts but kind to surfaces, making it perfect for daily dishwashing.
SUITABLE FOR ALL SINK TASKS: Ideal for dishes, cutlery, mugs, or even rinsing food containers, this washing up brush is a true multitasker. Pair with Elbow Grease Washing Up Liquid for best results.

SMART ADDITION TO CLEANING KIT: Compact, refillable and hardworking, this dish brush fits perfectly into any home cleaning routine. Combine it with our Elbow Grease kitchen range for a complete cleaning kit.
description: Product Description Tackle dirty dishes with less mess and more ease using the Elbow Grease Dish Brush with washing up liquid dispenser. Designed to make washing up quicker, easier and a lot more satisfying, this clever cleaning brush stores washing up liquid in the handle, letting users dispense as they scrub. With a built-in scouring sponge that’s tough on stains but gentle on dishes, it’s the ideal tool for busy households, student kitchens, or anyone who wants sparkling results with less hassle. Once the sponge wears down, simply clip on a new refill – no need to throw the whole brush away. Whether it’s baked-on pasta trays, greasy pans or stacks of cutlery after a Sunday roast, this refillable dish brush makes light work of it all. A smart addition to any collection of home essentials, it’s a must-have in the world of washing up. Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF
